natural_philosophy.note: +50% Campus adjacency and +1 Science in cities with a Campus.

craftsmen.note: +50% Industrial Zone adjacency and +2 Production in cities with an Industrial Zone.

town_charters.note: +50% Commercial Hub adjacency and +2 Gold in cities with a Commercial Hub.

naval_infrastructure.note: +50% Harbor adjacency and +2 Gold in cities with a Harbor.

master_artisans.note: +100% Industrial Zone adjacency. Obsolete at Ideology.

scientific_vanguard.note: Communism only: cities with an established Governor receive +10% Science and Production.

kolkhoz.note: Communism only: Campuses and Industrial Zones receive +2 Food and +2 Production.
